title: Data and Software Protection Lifecycle in Cloud Computing
description: A flowchart illustrating the key stages and techniques for protecting data and software throughout their lifecycle in a cloud environment, from creation to destruction.
relationships: Techniques applied at each stage: Encryption (at-rest, in-transit), Tokenization, and Masking for storage/transit. Access Controls, MFA, and IAM policies govern usage. Backup and Replication strategies handle archival. Cryptographic erasure and secure deletion techniques ensure destruction.
